message:
feat: add --service flag for daemon mode

When running with --service:
- Binds to port 0 (OS assigns available port)
- Writes assigned port to ~/.local/state/llm-proxy/port
- Uses ~/.llm-provider-logs/ as default log directory

This enables the proxy to run as a background service without port conflicts.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
